ops.title: cc-present ≥0.9.1 resolves artifacts by Claude window (any cwd); ≥0.9.2 skill docs invoke bare `cc-present`
ops.body: Since cc-present v0.9.1 (2026-07-13), artifacts are window-owned: the daemon canonicalizes every request's scope to a constant sentinel, so an artifact keys on (session id + claude pid) and every command — `round`, `update-block`, `reply`, `outcomes`, `close` — resolves from any cwd. `--cwd` parses but is inert; the missing-artifact error reads "no cc-present artifact for this window". Never work around the old cwd-scoping bug (cd-ing to the start directory, passing `--cwd`) again. Since v0.9.2, the skill docs invoke bare `cc-present` (no `"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/bin/cc-present"` prefix) — see [[plugin-bin-path-stale-snapshots]] for when bare resolution misbehaves. Boards started under ≤0.9.0 daemons keep directory scopes and are unreachable post-upgrade (linger in GET /api/sessions; no cleanup command).
